reflection.duplicateMessage: You've already written a reflection for today.
reflection.emptySubtitle: Your reflections will appear here once you write one.

shared.unavailable: Community reflections are unavailable right now.
shared.empty: No shared reflections yet today. Be the first to encourage someone.
shared.reportReasonPlaceholder: Optionally, tell us why (this is sent to our team).
shared.reportDone: Thanks — this reflection has been reported and hidden for you.
shared.reportError: Something went wrong sending your report. Please try again.

publicCompose.title: Shared Reflection
publicCompose.banner: Shared publicly, shown anonymously, visible to others today.
publicCompose.placeholder: Share an encouragement from today’s reading…
publicCompose.confirmMessage: This will be shared publicly, shown anonymously, and visible to others today.
publicCompose.alreadyMessage: You’ve already shared a public reflection today.
publicCompose.rejectedMessage: Your reflection couldn’t be shared because it may break the community rules. Please revise and try again.
publicCompose.unavailableMessage: Public sharing is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
publicCompose.bannedMessage: You’re not able to share public reflections.
publicCompose.moderationRetryMessage: We couldn’t review your reflection just now. Please try again in a moment.

error.title: 오늘의 말씀을 불러올 수 없습니다
error.subtitle: 인터넷에 연결한 후 다시 시도하거나, 오프라인에서 읽으려면 설정 → 오프라인 및 다운로드에서 이 번역본을 다운로드하세요.

settings.title: 읽기 설정
settings.trackReadingStreakDesc: 오늘의 말씀을 연속으로 열어본 일수를 셉니다.
